creator: flz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Le Jeudi 14 avril 2005 à 11:54 +0200, Dag-Erling Smørgrav a écrit :
> Florent Thoumie <flz@xbsd.org> writes:
> > 	This PR is more than 5 years old.
> 
> ports/doscmd is barely a year old.
> 
> > 	Maybe it's time to mark the port as :
> >
> > 	BROKEN= "This just doesn't work"
> 
> But it does work, except for -r.

	Submitter proposed to mark it BROKEN only if X support is 
	chosen. Since default is with X, I guess we should turn it off 
	too.

> The doscmd sources are in projcvs.  Perhaps you could test and submit
> patches against that?

	Unfortunately, even if I'm not too bad at making things compiles
	properly on FreeBSD, I'm quite sure I won't be able to do 
	anything. I'll have a look at this though, just because I'm 
	curious.

-- 
Florent Thoumie
flz@FreeBSD.org
